INSERT INTO events (event_type, source_system, source_flow, payload, dedupe_key)
VALUES (
  'FILE_ROUTE_FAILED',
  'n8n',
  'MX_08_File_Router',
  jsonb_build_object('source_event_id', '{{ $json.event_id }}', 'doc_type', '{{ $json.doc_type }}', 'subject', '{{ $json.subject }}', 'reason', 'no_project_match'),
  'file_route_failed_{{ $json.event_id }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (source_system, dedupe_key) WHERE dedupe_key IS NOT NULL DO NOTHING;

SELECT fn_route_file_to_folder(
  '{{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.doc_type }}',
  '{{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.file_name }}',
  '{{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.storage_path }}',
  '{{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.mime_type }}',
  {{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.file_size || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.superchat_message_id || '' }}'
) as result;

INSERT INTO events (event_type, project_id, source_system, source_flow, payload, dedupe_key)
VALUES (
  'FILE_ROUTED',
  '{{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  'n8n',
  'MX_08_File_Router',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'source_event_id', '{{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.event_id }}',
    'doc_type', '{{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.doc_type }}',
    'file_name', '{{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.file_name }}',
    'storage_path', '{{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.storage_path }}'
  ),
  'file_routed_{{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.event_id }}_{{ $('📋 Prepare Upload').first().json.file_name }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (source_system, dedupe_key) WHERE dedupe_key IS NOT NULL DO NOTHING;
